debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I J : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
h_J_le_I : I ≤ J
h_I_le_J : J ≤ I
h_final_left : ∀ N ∈ J, N ∈ I
⊢ ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
intro N hN
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ⟨h_N_not_in_J⟩
      let N' : I := ⟨N, hN⟩
      have h_A : ∃ A : J, N ≤ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I) N'
      rcases h_A with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      choose f hf hf' using h_I_le_J
      let h_B₁ := hf' N'.prop
      let h_B₂ := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_B₁
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) := by
          exact (J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_B₂ h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup (f N'.prop) ≤ A.val := h_B₁ ▸ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup (f N'.prop) = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [← h_B₁] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (I.not_bot_mem hN)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := by
        simpa [← h_B₁] using le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N ∈ J := by
        exact h_A_eq_N ▸ A.prop
      aesop
    classical
    have h_final : I = J := by
      apply Struct.ext
      <;> simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      <;> tauto
    exact h_final
